name: GroupMembershipExistenceResults
description: GroupMembershipExistenceResults schema from AWS IAM Identity Center

allOf.description: The identifier for a group in the identity store.
An object that contains the identifier of a group member. Setting the UserID field to the specific identifier for a user indicates that the user is a member of the group.
Indicates whether a membership relation exists or not.

items.description: Indicates whether a resource is a member of a group in the identity store.
